main.label: Product Main Image
main.prompt: A single black plastic exterior door handle for a Chevy Colorado or GMC Canyon rests on a clean, slightly textured dark gray automotive workbench. The handle is positioned at a 45-degree elevated angle, with the curved grip facing upward and the attachment clip visible on the rear. Professional studio lighting from a large softbox at 2 o'clock creates a soft, even illumination with a subtle catchlight on the black textured surface. A second fill light from the left reduces shadows. The handle casts a soft, diffused shadow to the right, with a contact shadow directly beneath it. The background is a smooth gradient from dark gray to light gray, keeping focus on the product. High resolution, commercial product photography, depth of field f/8 for full sharpness. No logos, no text, no brand names. The black plastic texture is clearly visible, with no reflections or glare.

fitment.label: Vehicle Compatibility Infographic
fitment.prompt: A clean, professional infographic-style image on a white background. The main element is a bold, elegant sans-serif text layout: '2004-2012 Chevy Colorado / GMC Canyon' in dark gray, with 'Front Left Door Handle' below in a smaller font. The years '04-12' are highlighted in a subtle metallic blue. In the lower right corner, a small, realistic 3D rendering of the black textured door handle is shown at a 15-degree angle, with its clip facing the viewer. The handle is sharp and detailed, with a soft cast shadow on the white surface. To the left, a simple line-art silhouette of a pickup truck (side view) is faintly featured, with an arrow pointing to the front left door area. A thin, modern border frames the layout. No logos, no text other than the compatibility info. High-end catalog spec card style, clean, professional, readable.

install.label: Installation Effect
install.prompt: A close-up view of a single black textured plastic front left door handle installed on a 2004-2012 Chevy Colorado or GMC Canyon door. The vehicle door is a neutral silver-gray metallic color with a clean, smooth surface. The handle is perfectly flush with the door, showing a factory-like fit. The handle's texture is clearly visible against the painted door. A subtle, soft blue glow effect (not a harsh arrow) emanates from the handle's outline, indicating the installation position. The background is a blurred automotive workshop environment with soft, even lighting from above. Shallow depth of field (f/2.8) keeps the handle and the immediate door area in sharp focus while blurring the background. The handle casts a soft contact shadow against the door panel. No logos, no emblems, no text on the vehicle.

selling_points.label: Selling Points Visualization
selling_points.prompt: A dynamic outdoor scene showing a single black textured plastic door handle in use. The handle is mounted on a simulated gray door panel, and a hand (wearing a dark glove) grips it firmly. Water droplets are beading on the handle's textured surface, illustrating weather resistance and anti-slip grip in rain. Bright, natural sunlight with a slight warm tone (golden hour) shines from the upper left, creating dramatic shadows. The background is a blurred landscape with light rain and misty trees, emphasizing durability in harsh conditions. The handle's black plastic texture is sharply detailed, with water pooling on the surface but not dripping. A UV protection icon (stylized sun with rays) is faintly superimposed in the top left corner as a clean graphic overlay. No logos, no text other than the UV icon. High-contrast, commercial photography style.

detail.label: Macro Detail Shot
detail.prompt: Extreme macro close-up of the black textured plastic surface of a single door handle. The shot is taken at a 90-degree angle to the surface, filling the frame. The fine grain of the anti-slip texture is sharply in focus, revealing tiny peaks and valleys. A small water droplet sits on the surface, reflecting the studio lighting. The background is completely blurred (bokeh effect) in neutral gray tones. Studio macro lighting from a ring light provides even, shadowless illumination, with a slight directional catchlight from a side softbox to enhance texture. The contrast is high, the black is deep and rich, with no glare or hotspots. Shallow depth of field (f/2.0 or f/1.4) to isolate the texture. No logos, no text, no fingerprints. The plastic material looks durable and premium.

shipping.label: Logistics & After-Sale Service
shipping.prompt: A clean, commercial graphic design on a white background. In the center, the single black textured plastic door handle is shown resting in a neatly opened brown corrugated cardboard box, surrounded by protective bubble wrap. The handle is angled slightly, with a soft shadow beneath it. To the right, three modern, flat-style icons in a vertical row: a truck icon with 'Free Shipping' text, a clock icon with 'Fast Delivery' text, and a calendar icon with '30-Day Returns' text. The icons are in a clean, minimal style, colored in a professional dark gray and blue. A subtle light blue background gradient adds depth. No logos, no brand names. The overall feel is professional, trustworthy, and organized. High-resolution, catalog layout style.
